summary.intent: Fix review comments on PR #519 in the moltis repo, specifically addressing a Greptile bot comment about a failing assertion when the browser port is empty (default port).
summary.outcome: Updated the e2e test file settings-nav.spec.js to handle the case where browser port is empty/default, linted and committed the fix, resolving the PR conversation.

repo: E2E specs live at crates/web/ui/e2e/specs/ and are linted after edits.
Greptile bot is used for automated PR review in the moltis-org/moltis repo.

code.finding: URL assertion logic needs to handle the case where the browser port is absent (default port 80/443), not just when a port is explicitly set.

workflow: Greptile bot comments should be treated as valid review feedback even if the scenario seems unlikely in CI.
Lint is run on test files after editing before committing.

friction: Greptile bot identified an edge case (empty browser port) that was not originally considered in the test assertion.
